policy: This is an explicit mechanical-evidence allowlist. The extractor must not scan any undeclared repository path.

sources.inclusionReason: Primary sanitized natural-conversation transcript; not a parser fixture, generated diagnostic, survey, grammar note, documentation example, adjudication record, or synthetic test.
Raw natural-conversation transcript is the primary record; derived turn/unit representations and adjudication copies are excluded below.

excludedSources.reason: Source metadata contains no primary natural-language records.
Derived turn-level copy of the included primary transcript.
Derived JSON turn-level copy of the included primary transcript.
Derived unit-level copy of the included primary transcript.
Derived JSON unit-level copy of the included primary transcript.
Derived turn-level copy of the included raw transcript.
Derived JSON turn-level copy of the included raw transcript.
Derived unit-level copy of the included raw transcript.
Derived JSON unit-level copy of the included raw transcript.
Human adjudication material is not primary corpus evidence.
Human adjudication material is not primary corpus evidence.
Research documentation may quote or transform source examples and is not a primary record.
Adjudication report is downstream analysis, not primary corpus evidence.
Functional test corpus is synthetic project-internal material.
Curated learning examples are not natural-corpus records for this workbench.
Gold test corpus is project-internal verification material.
Survey-readiness probes are elicitation/test material, not corpus evidence.
Implementation reachability probes are synthetic tests.
Parser fixture is synthetic project-internal material.
Parser fixture is synthetic project-internal material.
Regression fixture is generated or synthetic project-internal material.
Generated diagnostics are not primary corpus evidence.
Validation output is a generated copy of project test material.
Validation output is a generated copy of project test material.
Archived adjudication record is downstream project documentation.
Archived corpus addendum is project documentation rather than a primary source record.
